    "Conductor with incorrect insulation type installed in wet location",

    "De-energize and lock out affected circuit",

  "rationale": "NEC 310 requires conductors in wet locations to have insulation listed for wet use. Installing the wrong insulation type is a code violation and creates a shock/fire hazard.",
